notes: Re-enumerate every current service surface, especially weekday linner and ready-to-go, and reconcile individual current products against the 83 baseline rows.
Re-adjudicate row-level allergen evidence by preserving only explicit positive ingredients or unavoidable named identities; do not treat those positives as complete arrays.
Keep negative, may-contain, and cross-contact fields unavailable unless an authoritative item-specific or restaurant-wide disclosure is obtained.
Treat the zero-current-product and 83-baseline-only metrics as upstream enumeration defects, not restaurant facts.
